rwa-analyzer.description: An honest, agent-first backing-verification primitive for tokenized real-world assets (MCP/CLI/HTTP). Refuses to fake a green.

kite-credit.description: Cross-border credit scoring fusing on-chain (Solana) + off-chain identity with ZK-verified bank statements (Reclaim) and LLM explanations.

compute-swarm.description: Decentralized GPU compute marketplace — trustless x402/USDC micropayments on Base, Docker-sandboxed PyTorch/HF jobs.

commitment-parties.description: CommitMint — Solana commitment-pool platform for accountability & habit-building (Anchor). 3rd place, Global Solana Hackathon.

GraphRAG-Dodd-Frank.description: Knowledge-graph RAG over the 800-page Dodd-Frank Act (Microsoft GraphRAG + Neo4j) for regulatory Q&A.

texas-holdem-ocaml.description: Networked multiplayer Texas Hold'em in OCaml. TCP server, 2-6 terminal clients with ASCII rendering, a hand evaluator, and an interactive rulebook. CS 3110 team project.
